message:
feat(api,autograd,dispatch,kernel,conformance): enhance dispatch key routing, autograd scalar cases, and CPU kernel implementations

- crates/ft-api/src/lib.rs: API layer refinements for tensor operations
- crates/ft-autograd/src/lib.rs: Autograd engine improvements
- crates/ft-dispatch/src/lib.rs: Dispatch key routing enhancements
- crates/ft-kernel-cpu/src/lib.rs: CPU kernel implementation updates
- crates/ft-conformance/src/lib.rs: Conformance framework updates
- crates/ft-conformance/fixtures/dispatch_key_cases.json: Expanded dispatch key test cases
- crates/ft-conformance/fixtures/scalar_autograd_cases.json: New scalar autograd conformance cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
